features: Wrapped action/object stage filter chips with multi-select
No stage selection means show all entries
Entry highlight behavior aligned with explicit matrix markers
Marker and tag colors shared across entries, matrix cells, and chain diagrams
Phenomenon detail view with related entry chain drawings
Clickable related entry rows that re-highlight the matching entry
Paper panels using explicit DOI or URL links only
UI terminology normalized to 原发 / 继发

dataNotes.paperEntries: 61 unique DOI-backed entries in mutationData.js at generation time
dataNotes.phenomena: 21 phenomenon records with related entry rows
dataNotes.paperLinkPolicy: Do not use generic Google Scholar query URLs as final literature links; prefer journal, PMID, PMCID, DOI, or other source URLs.
